candidates.why: Header-style current asset section label, but not the reported total.
Explicit total current assets line on the balance sheet; best match for ACT.
Balancing line, not the reported current assets total.
Non-current balancing line, not current assets.
Non-current assets total, not ACT.

variables.notes: Chose the explicit total current assets line.

candidates.why: Direct balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents label; best match for CHE.
Close synonym for cash holdings, but the explicit cash and cash equivalents line is preferable.
Cash flow adjustment line, not balance-sheet cash.
Transaction-specific cash flow line, not ending cash balance on balance sheet.

candidates.row_label: Cash paid upon redemption of warrants
candidates.why: Financing cash flow line, not CHE.

candidates.row_label: Changes to cash and cash equivalents
candidates.why: Change in cash, not the balance-sheet stock variable.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at beginning of period
candidates.why: Beginning cash flow balance, not preferred versus balance-sheet line.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at end of period
candidates.why: Ending cash flow balance matches the concept, but balance-sheet line is preferred.

candidates.row_label: Changes to cash and liquid assets
candidates.why: Change in cash/liquid assets, not the stock variable.

variables.notes: Preferred the explicit balance-sheet label; included 'Cash and bank balances' as lower-priority alternate for years where terminology changes.

candidates.why: Component of current liabilities, not the total.
Debt component only, not total current liabilities.
Explicit total current liabilities line; best match for LCT.
Cash flow change line, not balance-sheet stock variable.
Balancing/component line, not total.
Balancing line, not reported total.
Non-current debt, not current liabilities total.
Non-current balancing line, not LCT.
Non-current liabilities total, not LCT.

variables.notes: Chose the explicit total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Direct match to current maturities of debt, but preview values are blank; still a plausible label for some years.
Appears within current liabilities section and likely represents current bond/current portion in years reported.

variables.notes: R:c. Excluded lease liabilities per rule. 'Bond' appears in the current liabilities section and is the clearest observed short-term debt line; included 'Debt Maturing Within 1 Year' as lower-priority alternate for label changes across years.

candidates.why: Best balance-sheet match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities payable.
Specific tax-related current liability, but narrower than overall taxes payable.
Indirect tax payable component, not as broad/preferred as Tax Liabilities.
Tax-related asset/current item on assets side here, not taxes payable.
Asset-side/current tax account item, not clearly taxes payable.

variables.notes: No shortlist was provided for TXP; selected the explicit balance-sheet tax liability label.

candidates.why: Direct PPE line on balance sheet; best match for PPEGT.
Contra-asset component, not the PPE total/net line.
Gross tangible assets could be relevant, but explicit PPE line is cleaner and preferred.
Cash flow/non-cash adjustment context, not balance-sheet PPE stock.

candidates.row_label: Sale of property, plant and equipment
candidates.why: Cash flow transaction line, not PPE stock.

candidates.row_label: Acquisition of property, plant and equipment
candidates.why: Cash flow transaction line, not PPE stock.

variables.notes: Used the explicit balance-sheet PPE line.

candidates.why: Contra-asset line, not total assets.
Explicit total assets line; best match for AT.

variables.notes: Chose the explicit total assets line.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities before changes in working capital
candidates.why: Operating cash flow before working-capital changes, not the final net operating cash flow.
Explicit net cash flow from operating activities; best match for OANCF.

variables.notes: Selected the final net operating cash flow line rather than the pre-working-capital subtotal.
